finding: B. Disorders of renal tubular reabsorption of phosphate

differentials.name: Renal tubular acidosis
differentials.raw: Renal tubular acidosis (renal loss of alkali)

differentials.name: Ifosfamide nephrotoxicity
differentials.raw: Ifosfamide nephrotoxicity (for the treatment of rhabdomyosarcoma, Wilms tumor)

differentials.name: Hypophosphatemia with nonendocrine tumors =  Oncogenic rickets = elaboration of humeral substance which inhibits tubular reabsorption of phosphates
differentials.raw: Hypophosphatemia with nonendocrine tumors =  Oncogenic rickets = elaboration of humeral substance which inhibits tubular reabsorption of phosphates (paraneoplastic phenomenon)
